name: ViewMapCommands
summary: Graphisoft official 'View Map Commands' command group — 2 JSON-RPC commands (Archicad 28.0).

methods.name: CloneProjectMapItemToViewMap
methods.summary: Clones a project map item to the view map.

params.name: projectMapNavigatorItemId
params.doc: The ID of the navigator item to be cloned. Only navigator items from the project map can be cloned.

params.name: parentNavigatorItemId
params.doc: The ID of the navigator item below which the new view will be inserted. Only navigator items from the view map are allowed.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: createdNavigatorItemId.

methods.name: CreateViewMapFolder
methods.signature: CreateViewMapFolder(folderParameters: FolderParameters, parentNavigatorItemId?: NavigatorItemId, previousNavigatorItemId?: NavigatorItemId): object
methods.summary: Creates a view folder item at the given position in the navigator tree.

params.name: folderParameters
params.doc: This is the name of the new folder.

params.name: parentNavigatorItemId
params.doc: The newly created folder will be placed under this parent item. If this parameter is not given the folder will be created as the first item in the View Map list.

params.name: previousNavigatorItemId
params.doc: The newly created folder will be placed after this sibling item. If this parameter is not given the folder will be created as the first item under the parent.

returns.doc: Returns an object with properties: createdFolderNavigatorItemId.
